No matter where you’re going, we take you there

Exclusive Escapes

Unlock unbeatable vacation packages with exclusive deals and perks, ensuring a getaway to your bucket list destinations in your budget.

Smoothly plan your dream vacation with our user-friendly platform, guaranteeing a hassle-free booking experience.

Customizable Holidays

We offer you personalized recommendations that transform ordinary trips into extraordinary adventures, curated per your preferences.

Timeless Support

Book with confidence, backed by our reliable 24/7 customer service team, making every moment of your vacation worry-free.

Creating world-class travel experiences

Travel to make memories all around the world

Vacation Vibes take you on Cloud Nine

It’s time to unplug and unwind. So, we offer you everything that is meant for a trip to treasure. With us, you will indulge in luxury at pocket-friendly rates that are coupled with packages and customized to your requirements.

Whether you are planning a family trip, a getaway with friends, or a romantic escape with your sweetheart, we make your holidays happen in a heartfelt manner. You choose your destination and leave the rest to us.

Explore new horizons and unveil wonders of the world!

Wanderlust and adventures await you in different parts of the planet. That’s why we step up to design remarkable vacations for you so that you have travel memories to cherish and stories to tell. Domestic or international, we plan every trip with detailed planning and maximum care.

Book A Package

When you book with wizfair travel you recieve

Affordable luxury, destination expertise, and the most diverse range of packaged as well as customized travel offerings…WizFair gives you more!

Vacation

Select well-designed vacation packages from our collection, for a trip just as you want.

Flights

Book your flight tickets at affordable rates with us to your chosen destination.

Hotel

Craving comfort? Find a stay to match your budget and requirements, and treat yourself to the ultimate luxury.

Transfers

We add more convenience to your trips with transfers around your chosen destination.

Visa

Get reliable VISA assistance for your international trips.

Insurance

With travel insurance, avoid travel risks and get medical treatment coverage.

24/7 support

Our prompt customer service team is always there to assist you in real-time.

Sightseeing

Explore around your dream destination with our well-designed sightseeing plan.

Best Budget Travel Destinations

Scared of the Skyway robbery? Not anymore!! Pack your bags and book yourself with budget-friendly destinations that host hidden beauties and magical getaways.

Trustpilot Customers Reviews

Our customers return to us everytime a trip is on their mind. Here’s a glance at the star-studded reviews with which customers have crowned our services.

Murphy was OUT- FRICKIN STANDING. He was patient, understanding and extremely helpful with our emergency situation. Everything went as well as could be expected and smoother than a typical flight. You should be very proud of this TOP NOTCH EMPLOYEE !

Greg Stagon

Austin Kennedy was extremely patient working with me on securing airline tickets. I am 82 years old and very hard of hearing so he started texting me so I could follow directions. It took nearly two hours but he made sure it happened.

chuck Peterson

The Agent was very helpful in providing the best deal especially for the return journey. I had to wait for a while, however I understand that it always take sometime to have things completed. I am used to doing online bookings...

Ian Lubsey

Murphy was very helpful very patient and precisely achieved all the points that what we were looking for in the booking my mother in law flight to Portland, Oregon. Thank you so much I appreciate your help.

Iman Loutfy

My associate Amarilla Banks was wonderful! She was able to find me a better flight than the one my husband and I were looking for. She went above and beyond to keep me informed. I will definitely use Wizfair again...

Stephany Wilson

What Our
Customers are saying

Booked a Paris trip

Happy to have booked a tour package to Paris with WizfairLLC. Pam helped me with the booking. She is polite and patient. Listened to my concerns and addressed each of those well.

Jordan Matthew

Tennessee, USA

Purchased tickets to Bali.

I booked my Bali trip with WizfairLLC. I got connected to Juan, who thoroughly helped me with the booking. He cooperated well and clarified my doubts.

Christina Blake

Honolulu, USA
